source_jobs.title: RevOps Analytics Engineer
source_jobs.description:
POSITION OVERVIEW

Lean Layer is the #1 Rated RevOps Agency on G2, and we’re doubling our consulting team over the next year. Our reputation is built on excellent results, which means we need to keep hiring excellent people. We are looking for a RevOps Analytics Engineer with deep Revenue Operations expertise to own and maintain the data infrastructure that powers revenue analytics and reporting across our client environments.

This role focuses on data engineering and warehouse management, ensuring reliable pipelines, scalable data models, and high-quality revenue data. The RevOps Analytics Engineer will work closely with RevOps consultants who define CRM and business requirements, and with data analysts who build dashboards and reporting.

You may be a fit for the RevOps Analytics Engineer role if you are strong in SQL, data modeling, and warehouse architecture, and can understand the business context of revenue operations in order to build reliable and scalable data systems.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

The ideal candidate:

 - Enjoys building reliable data systems and solving complex data problems

 - Has strong technical data engineering skills

 - Understands how revenue teams use data for reporting and decision-making

 - Can translate business context into scalable data models

 - Is comfortable working across multiple systems and client environments

 - Is comfortable working directly with clients as needed

 - Thrives in collaborative, fast-paced environments



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Data Warehouse Ownership:

 - Design and maintain datasets and table structures

 - Manage warehouse performance, partitioning, clustering, and cost optimization

 - Maintain access controls and permissions

 - Structure warehouse schemas to support revenue analytics and reporting

Data Pipelines & Integrations:

 - Build and maintain ETL / ELT pipelines from revenue systems into the warehouse

 - Integrate data from systems such as HubSpot, Salesforce, marketing and sales analytics platforms, sales engagement platforms, billing systems, and product analytics tools

 - Monitor pipeline health and resolve failures

 - Manage schema changes from upstream systems

 - Ensure reliable and timely data synchronization

 - Manage GitHub repositories

Data Modeling for Revenue Analytics:

 - Design and maintain analytics-ready data models

 - Build models for accounts, contacts, opportunities, and pipeline data

BI & Analytics Support:

 - Maintain tables and models used by BI tools such as Looker

 - Optimize queries and support derived tables used in reporting

 - Ensure consistent metric definitions across reporting layers

 - Dashboard creation for data validation

Data Quality & Reliability:

 - Implement data validation and testing

 - Monitor pipeline health and data freshness

 - Identify and resolve data inconsistencies

 - Maintain documentation for warehouse models and data definitions



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

 - 3–5 years of experience in data engineering or analytics engineering

 - Strong SQL skills

 - Experience working with data warehouses (BigQuery, Snowflake, Redshift, etc.)

 - Experience working with Salesforce or HubSpot as a data source

 - Experience building and maintaining ETL / ELT pipelines

 - Experience designing analytics-ready data models

 - Familiarity with API-based integrations and data syncing

 - Python for data pipelines or automation

 - Reverse ETL or operational data workflows

 - dbt or similar transformation tools

 - Looker or similar BI platforms

 - Experience with GitHub



PREFERRED EXPERIENCE

Experience working with revenue or business systems and terminology such as:

 - Marketing Automation Platforms (MAP) like HubSpot

 - Marketing analytics platforms

 - SaaS revenue metrics (ARR, ACV, TCV, MRR, etc.)

 - SaaS terminology (MQL, SQL, SQO, Deal/Opportunity, Lead/Contact, etc.)


Learn more about what it's like to work at Lean Layer here https://www.leanlayer.com/career-at-lean-layer.

Visa Sp

source_jobs.title: Engagement Manager
source_jobs.description:
Position Overview

Lean Layer is the #1 Rated RevOps Agency on G2, and we’re doubling our consulting team over the next year. Our reputation is built on excellent results — which means we need to keep hiring excellent people. We’re looking for Engagement Managers with deep Revenue Operations expertise to help our clients solve their toughest RevOps challenges.

In this role, you’ll be the primary point of contact for your clients, leading strategic initiatives across the revenue engine. You will have the opportunity to work with companies of different sizes, industries, and tech stacks making this the ideal opportunity if you are looking to accelerate your career growth.

At Lean Layer, you’ll join a tight-knit team that values curiosity, ownership, and impact. We move fast, think deeply, and treat our clients’ businesses like our own. If you love solving complex problems and want to grow with one of the most respected RevOps teams in the industry, apply below.

Qualifications

 - Experience and Technical Skills
   
   - Sales and Marketing Operations Experience: Demonstrated success in a Sales Operations, Marketing Operations or Revenue Operations role. Experience transitioning between individual contributor (IC) and manager roles is highly valued.
   
   - CRM Proficiency: Experience with Salesforce and/or HubSpot as an administrator.
     
     - You should be comfortable with custom objects, building workflows/flows, creating validation rules, building reporting.
   
   - Project Management Tools: Familiarity with tools like Asana, Trello, Jira, or Microsoft Project to manage tasks and ensure project success.
   
   - Data Analysis: Strong analytical skills with experience using tools like Excel, Tableau, Looker, or other BI platforms to extract insights and inform decisions.

 - Collaboration and Team Leadership
   
   - Team Leadership: Proven ability to lead cross-functional teams, ensuring alignment and collaboration
   
   - Delegation Expertise: Adept at assigning tasks effectively based on team members’ strengths and expertise.
   
   - Motivational Skills: Skilled in inspiring and energizing team members to achieve common goals and meet deadlines.

 - Client Engagement Skills
   
   - Discovery and Assessment: Ability to conduct comprehensive discovery sessions with clients to identify needs, pain points, and root causes of challenges.
   
   - Clear Problem Articulation: Expertise in summarizing and articulating client problems in a way that is concise, actionable, and understood by all stakeholders.
   
   - Proactive Problem-Solving: Capacity to anticipate client needs and address challenges based on industry knowledge and prior experience.

Roles and Responsibilities

 - Design, implement, and optimize workflows and processes to support revops, sales, and marketing teams.

 - Audit CRM systems (Salesforce/HubSpot) to ensure data accuracy, generate actionable insights, and drive business efficiency.

 - Collaborate with stakeholders to streamline tools and systems that enhance productivity.

 - Lead cross-functional teams to align on goals, deadlines, and project deliverables.

 - Manage team dynamics by fostering collaboration and ensuring clear communication across all departments.

 - Conduct detailed client discovery sessions to understand needs, identify challenges, and provide tailored solutions.

 - Collaborate with internal teams to develop actionable plans addressing client pain points.

 - Anticipate potential obstacles and proactively develop strategies to resolve them before they impact project timelines.

 - Analyze operational and sales data to uncover trends, identify areas for improvement, and measure success.

 - Create and maintain dashboards and reports to track performance metrics and present insights to stakeholders.

 - Implement data-driven decisions that enhance overall efficiency and client satisfaction.
   

Learn more about what it's like to work at Lean Layer here https://www.leanlaye

source_jobs.title: Salesforce Technical Consultant
source_jobs.description:
Company Overview

Lean Layer is the #1 Rated RevOps Agency on G2, and we’re doubling our consulting team over the next year. Our reputation is built on excellent results — which means we need to keep hiring excellent people. We’re looking for Salesforce Consultants with deep Revenue Operations expertise to help our clients solve their toughest RevOps challenges.

At Lean Layer, you’ll join a tight-knit team that values curiosity, ownership, and impact. We move fast, think deeply, and treat our clients’ businesses like our own. If you love solving complex problems and want to grow with one of the most respected RevOps teams in the industry, apply below.


Position Overview

As a Salesforce Consultant, you’ll work directly with clients to assess their needs, design tailored Salesforce solutions, and ensure seamless implementation. This role is ideal for someone with a strong background in Salesforce configurations, automations, and data integrations who also has a passion for problem-solving and a client-focused approach. Working closely with Engagement Managers and other consultants, you’ll deliver high-quality solutions across a variety of industries, helping clients get the most out of their Salesforce investment.

Qualifications

 - A bachelor’s degree in a related field such as Business, Finance, Operations, as well as Engineering degrees. We are looking for a diversity of backgrounds with strong foundation of analytical, logical, and organizational skills.

 - Minimum of 2 years of experience as a RevOps professional, preferably experienced working with a US-based company.

 - Fluent English communication skills both written and verbal.

 - Strong work ethic with a consistent record of leading projects to success.

 - 3-7+ years of Salesforce administration or consulting experience, preferably with exposure to US-based clients.

 - Proven experience with Salesforce configuration, workflows, automations, and integrations. Salesforce Administrator or related certifications are highly preferred.

 - Familiarity with Apex, Lightning, Flows, and third-party tools that integrate with Salesforce (e.g., HubSpot, Outreach, Marketo).

 - Strong ability to translate business needs into technical solutions and troubleshoot complex issues.

 - Excellent communication skills (written and verbal), client-facing professionalism, and a collaborative mindset.

 - Ability to quickly adapt resources to changing project demands and address staffing challenges.

 - Familiarity with RevOps functions to effectively evaluate candidate fit and align staffing to project requirements.

 - Excellent communication and negotiation skills to manage resource needs.

 - Strong organizational skills to handle multiple projects and meet staffing demands within timelines.



Roles and Responsibilities

 - Client Collaboration: Partner with engagement managers to gather client requirements, conduct needs assessments, and propose Salesforce-based solutions.

 - Salesforce Customization: Configure Salesforce environments, including creating workflows, automations, reports, and dashboards tailored to client needs.

 - Data Management: Handle data migrations, clean-up, and integrations to ensure accuracy and consistency across Salesforce systems.

 - Problem-Solving: Troubleshoot and resolve Salesforce-related issues, identifying gaps in workflows and recommending best practices.

 - Project Execution: Manage task deadlines effectively while delivering high-quality solutions that align with client expectations.

 - Training & Support: Provide guidance to end-users and stakeholders on Salesforce functionalities and best practices.

 - Quality Assurance: Test all configurations and customizations to ensure solutions meet technical and business requirements.


About You:

 - Loves Salesforce: You have a deep understanding of the Salesforce platform and take pride in leveraging its capabilities to solve complex business challenges.

 - Thrives on Problem-Solving: Tack

source_jobs.title: HubSpot Technical Consultant
source_jobs.description:
Company Overview

Lean Layer is the #1 Rated RevOps Agency on G2, and we’re doubling our consulting team over the next year. Our reputation is built on excellent results — which means we need to keep hiring excellent people. We’re looking for HubSpot Consultants with deep Revenue Operations expertise to help our clients solve their toughest RevOps challenges.

At Lean Layer, you’ll join a tight-knit team that values curiosity, ownership, and impact. We move fast, think deeply, and treat our clients’ businesses like our own. If you love solving complex problems and want to grow with one of the most respected RevOps teams in the industry, apply below.

Position Overview

In this role, you will be at the forefront of helping clients streamline their marketing, sales, and customer service operations through the HubSpot platform. This role is perfect for someone with hands-on experience in HubSpot configurations, workflows, and reporting who is passionate about problem-solving and helping clients achieve their goals. You'll work closely with engagement managers and other team members to design, implement, and support scalable solutions tailored to client needs.


Qualifications

 - A bachelor’s degree in a related field such as Business, Finance, Operations, as well as Engineering degrees. We are looking for a diversity of backgrounds with strong foundation of analytical, logical, and organizational skills.

 - Minimum of 2 years of experience as a RevOps professional, preferably experienced working with a US-based company.

 - Fluent English communication skills both written and verbal.

 - Strong work ethic with a consistent record of leading projects to success.

 - 3-7+ years of experience working with HubSpot (Marketing Hub, Sales Hub, Service Hub) in an administrative or consulting capacity.

 - Deep knowledge of HubSpot tools, including workflows, sequences, reports, dashboards, and integrations. HubSpot certifications are a strong plus.

 - Familiarity with integrations and tools that complement HubSpot, such as Zapier, CRM connectors, and analytics platforms.

 - Strong ability to translate business needs into technical solutions and troubleshoot complex issues.

 - Excellent communication skills (written and verbal), client-facing professionalism, and a collaborative mindset.

 - Ability to quickly adapt resources to changing project demands and address staffing challenges.

 - Familiarity with RevOps functions to effectively evaluate candidate fit and align staffing to project requirements.

 - Excellent communication and negotiation skills to manage resource needs.

 - Strong organizational skills to handle multiple projects and meet staffing demands within timelines.


Responsibilities


Client Solutions: Collaborate with engagement managers to assess client challenges and craft custom HubSpot-based solutions.

HubSpot Optimization: Configure HubSpot environments, including building workflows, automations, and sequences that align with client business processes.

Data Analysis: Create detailed dashboards and reports to provide actionable insights on marketing, sales, and service performance.

Integrations: Implement and troubleshoot integrations between HubSpot and other tools in the client’s tech stack (e.g., CRMs, analytics tools, email marketing platforms).

Training & Support: Provide clients with training and ongoing support to ensure they maximize their use of HubSpot.

Testing & Validation: Test all workflows and configurations to ensure they are accurate, logical, and effective in solving the intended business problem.

Project Execution: Deliver projects on time with a high degree of quality, meeting client expectations at every step.

Troubleshooting: Identify and resolve issues in HubSpot configurations or processes, recommending best practices where necessary.


About You


Loves HubSpot: You have a deep understanding of the HubSpot platform and enjoy designing creative solutions to help businesses grow.

T

source_jobs.title: RevOps BI Architect
source_jobs.description:
POSITION OVERVIEW

Lean Layer is the #1 Rated RevOps Agency on G2, and we’re doubling our consulting team over the next year. Our reputation is built on excellent results, which means we need to keep hiring excellent people. We’re looking for RevOps BI Architects with deep Revenue Operations expertise to own the analytics and visualization layer of our data environments.

This role focuses on transforming structured warehouse data into clear, reliable, and scalable reporting experiences used by executives and revenue teams. The RevOps BI Architect ensures dashboards, metrics, and visualizations are consistent, performant, and easy to understand.

Working closely with a team of RevOps Consultants, this role ensures that data is translated into high-quality reporting products and intuitive data experiences.

The ideal candidate combines strong technical BI skills with a deep understanding of data storytelling, dashboard design, and metric standardization, ensuring that reporting remains consistent across clients and stakeholders.




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

The ideal candidate:

 - Enjoys building clean, intuitive data experiences

 - Is passionate about making data understandable for non-technical users

 - Has strong attention to detail and reporting consistency

 - Understands the operational needs of revenue teams

 - Can balance technical rigor with clarity and simplicity

 - Thrives in environments where they own and improve analytics products over time




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

BI Platform & Semantic Layer Ownership:

 - Design and maintain semantic layers and reporting models used in BI tools such as Looker,PowerBI, Tableau, or similar platforms

 - Define and maintain standardized metric definitions used across dashboards and reporting environments

 - Create reusable measures, calculated fields, and explore structures to support scalable reporting

 - Manage BI platform permissions, access controls, and governance

 - Maintain documentation for key reporting metrics, explores, and dashboards

Dashboard & Visualization Development:

 - Design and build executive and operational dashboards for revenue teams

 - Create reporting for pipeline, funnel, marketing performance, and revenue analytics

 - Develop reusable dashboard templates that can be deployed across multiple client environments

 - Structure dashboards to ensure clarity, usability, and decision-focused reporting

 - Maintain and improve existing dashboards to ensure accuracy and usability

BI Performance & Optimization:

 - Optimize BI queries, explores, and derived tables to improve dashboard performance

 - Identify and resolve slow queries or inefficient reporting structures

 - Work closely with Analytics Engineers to improve underlying data models for reporting

 - Implement best practices to reduce query costs and improve dashboard load times

 - Ensure reporting environments scale efficiently across multiple client environments

Reporting Governance & Standardization:

 - Standardize KPI definitions and reporting logic across dashboards and analytics environments

 - Establish and maintain dashboard naming conventions and reporting standards

 - Maintain an organized catalog of dashboards and reporting assets

 - Identify and consolidate duplicate or redundant reporting assets

 - Ensure reporting outputs remain consistent across stakeholders and systems

Data UX & Analytics Product Design:

 - Design dashboards and visualizations that clearly communicate complex revenue insights

 - Translate analytical models and metrics into intuitive visual reporting experiences

 - Simplify complex analytics into clear visuals for executive and operational audiences

 - Ensure dashboards answer meaningful business questions rather than simply displaying data



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

 - 3–5 years of experience in Business Intelligence or Data Visualization roles

 - Strong experience with BI tools such as:
   
   - Looker
   
   - Tableau
   
   - PowerBI

source_jobs.title: Senior Business Analyst
source_jobs.description:
Position Overview

Lean Layer is the #1 Rated RevOps Agency on G2, and we're doubling our consulting team over the next year. Our reputation is built on excellent results, which means we need to keep hiring excellent people. We're looking for a Senior Business Analyst to own the slide-grade analytics layer of our client engagements.

This role focuses on transforming Salesforce pipeline data and BI tool outputs into clear, board-grade deliverables used by PE sponsors and portfolio company executives. The Senior Business Analyst ensures decks, commentary, and presentations are causal, polished, and PE-ready.

Working closely with a team of Engagement Managers and RevOps BI Architects, this role ensures that data is translated into high-quality slide products and intuitive executive narratives.

The ideal candidate combines strong slide craft with a deep understanding of go-to-market analytics, executive storytelling, and PE-standard reporting, ensuring that output remains consistent across engagements and stakeholders.



What We're Looking For

The ideal candidate:

 - Enjoys building clean, board-grade slide deliverables

 - Is passionate about making data understandable for PE sponsors and C-suite executives

 - Has strong attention to detail and output consistency

 - Understands the operational needs of revenue teams and PE deal cycles

 - Can balance analytical rigor with clarity and narrative

 - Thrives in environments where they own and improve deliverables across multiple engagements over time



Key Responsibilities

Slide Craft & Deck Ownership:

 - Build slide-grade analytics from Salesforce pipeline data and Power BI outputs

 - Write action titles and causal commentary; walk PE deal teams through the result

 - Build modular, reusable templates that portfolio company CFOs can refresh next cycle without us

 - Cascade real-time feedback from PE sponsors during board prep

Go-to-Market Analytics & Storytelling:

 - Attribute pipeline variance to specific deals, segments, or process changes

 - Translate BI visuals and Salesforce data into executive-facing narratives

 - Produce pipeline, funnel, and revenue analytics commentary for board and executive audiences

 - Ensure every deck answers meaningful business questions rather than simply displaying data

Client Enablement:

 - Train in-house teams to become self-sufficient

 - Build deliverables that outlive the engagement

 - Document client-specific glossaries and reporting conventions



Required Qualifications

 - 4–7 years of experience in management consulting, revenue operations, PE portfolio operations, or analytics consulting

 - Demonstrated slide craft: action titles, pyramid principle structure, board-pack fluency

 - Go-to-market analytics literacy: ACV, TCV, coverage, slippage, and win rate as working concepts

 - Experience reading Salesforce pipeline data without hand-holding

 - Ability to translate complex data into clear executive narratives

 - Experience presenting to a CCO, CFO, or PE deal team

 - Proven ownership of a board-grade deliverable end to end (as the person who held the pen)

 - Strong attention to detail; a typo in the application is a filter, not a footnote



Preferred Experience

 - McKinsey, Strategy&, Bain, BCG, Monitor Deloitte, EY-Parthenon, or similar consulting pedigree

 - dbt or modern data stack literacy

 - Strong experience with BI tools such as:
   
   - Looker
   
   - PowerBI
   
   - Tableau
   
   - Sigma
   
   - Mode
   
   - Domo



Visa Sponsorship: Please note that we are not currently able to offer US visa sponsorship or transfer for this position.

For Canadian and Brazilian Residents: We also invite you to apply for this position but please note that at this time we can only hire those outside of the United States as full-time contractors. If you have any questions about this setup, please don't hesitate to reach out.

notes: Lean Layer is a RevOps agency with a strong focus on consulting and analytics. Most job postings require technical expertise in Salesforce, HubSpot, or data engineering.
